title: Vortex Web runtime and theme update
summary: This update continues the move away from the old 2+2 layout and into the new Vortex Web runtime, with cleaner runtime bridges, WebGPU work, better settings, and early theme/profile customisation support.
changelog: Moved more of the browser client into the bundled Vortex Web runtime and cleaned up old runtime bridge naming.
Continued the WebGPU renderer migration with runtime quality controls, shadow settings, fog controls, and render distance options.
Added and improved in-game settings, keybind controls, dev tools, and cleaner HUD styling.
Added early site and in-game theme editing support, including runtime theme presets and live custom CSS work.
Improved profile customisation support with badges, name gradients, nameplates, and leaderboard cosmetic rendering.
Refactored multiplayer bridge services so relay, runtime exports, coordinate conversion, debug tools, chat, and remote players are better separated.
Kept moving legacy 2+2-only code out of the core direction while preparing for streamed assets, equipment, physics, and scripting APIs.
